/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/Voxel-Engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o Voxel-Engine  include/glfw/src/libglfw3.a libglad.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
